title: iris pseudacorus subsp. bastardii
intro: Iris pseudacorus subsp. bastardii, also known as Yellow Flag or Iris pseudacorus subsp. bastardii, is a subspecies of the Yellow Flag plant, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the iris family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Iris pseudacorus subsp. bastardii include its potential to relieve symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. Iris pseudacorus subsp. bastardii can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and has been used in traditional herbal remedies for its medicinal properties.
